title: Intensely Rich Turkish Cream Su Boregi
description: A rich and creamy Turkish dish featuring heavy cream and a malty flavor, perfect for satisfying midnight cravings. This su boregi is made with reduced cream and raw-friendly ingredients, served in a lacquerware bowl.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, malted milk powder, granulated sugar, and salt until the sugar is dissolved.
Reduce the cream mixture over medium heat until it thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, egg, and vanilla extract.
Layer the phyllo dough in a lacquerware bowl, brushing each layer with the butter mixture.
Pour the reduced cream mixture over the phyllo dough layers.
Bake the su boregi for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the su boregi from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
